message:
feat(search): wire incremental Tantivy indexing into send/reply message pipeline

Messages are now indexed into the Tantivy lexical search index immediately
after send_message and reply_message succeed. Previously the TantivyBridge
existed but messages were never written to it, leaving the index empty at
runtime.

- Add IndexableMessage struct and index_message()/index_messages_batch()
  to search_v3.rs with fire-and-forget semantics (failures logged, not
  propagated to callers)
- Add enqueue_message_lexical_index() helper in messaging.rs
- Hook both send_message and reply_message to index after DB commit
- Invalidate search cache on each index update
- Add 7 tests: bridge-direct indexing, batch indexing, no-bridge graceful
  skip, empty batch, field roundtrip, None thread_id, Clone/Debug

Closes br-2tnl.9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
